about.title: We turn moments into memories that move
about.lead: Meli began with a simple belief: an invitation should feel as special as the day it celebrates.
body: Founded in a little studio full of spring flowers, we set out to replace flat, forgettable invites with cards that breathe — petals that drift, lines that draw themselves, colours soft as morning light.
Today, thousands of families across the world use Meli to mark their weddings, welcome new babies, celebrate another year, and honour those they've lost — each with the grace the moment deserves.

values.title: Crafted with care
values.description: Every template is designed by hand and animated frame by frame.

values.title: Beautifully accessible
